configurations.name: Frontend (Next.js)
runtimeArgs: export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH && cd /Users/khalharbi/Desktop/JADWA/frontend && npm run dev

configurations.name: Backend (FastAPI)
runtimeArgs: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

configurations.name: Celery Worker
runtimeArgs: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && celery -A app.tasks.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=4
